AUTHOR: Alplox

en-GB.githubHelpStep1: 1. Go to GitHub Settings > Developer settings > Personal access tokens > Tokens (classic).
en-GB.githubHelpStep2Gist: 2. Generate a new token with only the 'gist' scope.
en-GB.githubHelpStep2Repo: 2. Generate a new token with the 'repo' scope (required for private repositories).
en-GB.githubHelpStep4Repo: 4. Create a private repository on your GitHub account and enter the Owner and Name below.
en-GB.githubHelpImportant: Important: Never share your token or Gist ID with anyone outside this script.
en-GB.githubBackupNowInfo: This will create a backup of all saved videos in JSON format. The file will be uploaded as a secret Gist on GitHub. Note that although it is not public, anyone with the Gist ID can access its contents. This is inherent to how GitHub Gists work and cannot be controlled by this userscript.
en-GB.githubRepoBackupNowInfo: This will create a backup of all saved videos in JSON format. The file will be uploaded to your private repository as 'youtube-playback-plox-backup.json'. Your backup history will be maintained via Git commits.
en-GB.githubBackupTypeGist: GitHub Gist (Secret but not fully private)
en-GB.githubAutoDeleteToken: Auto-delete token from script after manual backup
en-GB.githubGistSafe: Gists only require the 'gist' scope (minimal privilege).
en-GB.githubCleanupStep1: To completely remove data, delete the Gist or Repository directly on GitHub.
en-GB.githubCleanupStep2: For repositories, deleting the backup file leaves history in previous commits. Deleting the entire repository is the only way to remove all traces.
en-GB.githubRepoPrivacyError: Error: The repository must be private to perform the backup.

fr.githubHelpStep1: 1. Allez dans Paramètres GitHub > Paramètres développeur > Jetons d'accès personnel > Jetons (classiques).

hr.githubCleanupStep2: Brisanje datoteke ne briše povijest. Obriši cijeli repozitorij.

zh.githubHelpStep1: 1. 前往 GitHub 设置 > Developer settings > Personal access tokens > Tokens (classic)。
zh.githubHelpStep2Gist: 2. 生成仅带 'gist' 权限的新令牌。
zh.githubHelpStep2Repo: 2. 生成带 'repo' 权限的新令牌（私有仓库必需）。
zh.githubHelpStep3: 3. 在下方粘贴生成的令牌。
zh.githubHelpStep4Repo: 4. 在你的 GitHub 帐号创建一个私有仓库，并输入 Owner 和 Name。
zh.githubHelpImportant: 重要：不要将令牌或 Gist ID 分享给脚本外的任何人。
zh.githubGistIdExample: 示例 Gist ID: https://gist.github.com/Alplox/123456789 -> ID: 123456789
zh.githubBackupNowInfo: 这将创建所有已保存视频的 JSON 备份。文件将作为私密 Gist 上传到 GitHub。请注意，虽然它不是公开的，但拥有 Gist ID 的人仍可访问内容，这是 GitHub Gist 的固有行为，与脚本无关。
zh.githubRepoBackupNowInfo: 这将创建所有已保存视频的 JSON 备份。文件将上传到你的私有仓库，命名为 'youtube-playback-plox-backup.json'。备份历史将通过 Git 提交记录保存。
zh.githubBackupTypeGist: GitHub Gist（私密但非完全私有）
zh.githubAutoDeleteToken: 手动备份后从脚本中自动删除令牌
zh.githubGistSafe: Gist 仅需 'gist' 权限（最小权限）。
zh.githubCleanupStep1: 要完全删除数据，可直接在 GitHub 上删除 Gist 或仓库。
zh.githubCleanupStep2: 对于仓库，删除备份文件仍会保留之前提交的历史。删除整个仓库是清除所有痕迹的唯一方法。
zh.githubRepoPrivacyError: 错误：仓库必须为私有才能进行备份。

zh-HK.githubRepoBackupNowInfo: 這將創建所有已保存影片的 JSON 備份。檔案將上傳到你的私有倉庫，命名為 'youtube-playback-plox-backup.json'。備份歷史將透過 Git 提交保留。

zh-HK.githubAutoDeleteToken: 手動備份後自動刪除權杖
zh-HK.githubGistSafe: Gist 只需 'gist' 權限（最小權限）。
zh-HK.githubCleanupStep1: 要完全刪除資料，可直接在 GitHub 刪除 Gist 或倉庫。
zh-HK.githubCleanupStep2: 對於倉庫，刪除備份檔仍會保留先前提交歷史。刪除整個倉庫是清除所有痕跡的唯一方法。

ko.githubHelpStep1: 1. GitHub 설정 > Developer settings > Personal access tokens > Tokens (classic)로 이동합니다.

ko.githubHelpImportant: 중요: 토큰이나 Gist ID를 스크립트 외부 사람과 공유하지 마세요.
ko.githubBackupNowInfo: 모든 저장된 비디오를 JSON 형식으로 백업합니다. 파일은 비밀 Gist로 GitHub에 업로드됩니다. 공개는 아니지만, Gist ID를 가진 사람은 내용을 확인할 수 있습니다. 이는 GitHub Gist의 고유 동작으로, 스크립트에서 제어할 수 없습니다.
ko.githubRepoBackupNowInfo: 모든 저장된 비디오를 JSON 형식으로 백업합니다. 파일은 'youtube-playback-plox-backup.json' 이름으로 개인 저장소에 업로드됩니다. 백업 기록은 Git 커밋으로 유지됩니다.
ko.githubAutoDeleteToken: 수동 백업 후 스크립트에서 토큰 자동 삭제
ko.githubCleanupStep1: 데이터를 완전히 삭제하려면 GitHub에서 Gist 또는 저장소를 직접 삭제하세요.
ko.githubCleanupStep2: 저장소의 경우, 백업 파일을 삭제하면 이전 커밋의 기록은 남습니다. 전체 저장소를 삭제해야 모든 흔적이 제거됩니다.

id.githubHelpStep1: 1. Buka GitHub Settings > Developer settings > Personal access tokens > Tokens (classic).
id.githubHelpStep2Gist: 2. Buat token baru hanya dengan scope 'gist'.
id.githubHelpStep2Repo: 2. Buat token baru dengan scope 'repo' (diperlukan untuk repository pribadi).

id.githubBackupNowInfo: Ini akan membuat backup semua video yang disimpan dalam format JSON. File akan diunggah sebagai Gist rahasia di GitHub. Meskipun tidak publik, siapa pun yang memiliki Gist ID dapat mengaksesnya. Ini adalah perilaku GitHub Gist, di luar kendali skrip.
id.githubRepoBackupNowInfo: Ini akan membuat backup semua video yang disimpan dalam format JSON. File akan diunggah ke repository pribadi Anda sebagai 'youtube-playback-plox-backup.json'. Riwayat backup akan disimpan melalui commit Git.
id.githubBackupTypeGist: GitHub Gist (Rahasia tapi tidak sepenuhnya privat)
id.githubAutoDeleteToken: Hapus token otomatis dari skrip setelah backup manual
id.githubCleanupStep1: Untuk menghapus data sepenuhnya, Anda bisa menghapus Gist atau Repository langsung di GitHub.
id.githubCleanupStep2: Untuk repository, menghapus file backup tetap meninggalkan riwayat commit sebelumnya. Menghapus seluruh repository adalah satu-satunya cara untuk membersihkan semua jejak.
id.githubRepoPrivacyError: Kesalahan: Repository harus privat untuk melakukan backup.

ms.githubHelpStep1: 1. Pergi ke Tetapan GitHub > Developer settings > Personal access tokens > Tokens (classic).
ms.githubHelpStep2Gist: 2. Hasilkan token baru hanya dengan skop 'gist'.
ms.githubHelpStep2Repo: 2. Hasilkan token baru dengan skop 'repo' (diperlukan untuk repositori peribadi).

ms.githubBackupNowInfo: Ini akan membuat sandaran semua video tersimpan dalam format JSON. Fail akan dimuat naik sebagai Gist rahsia di GitHub. Walaupun tidak awam, sesiapa yang mempunyai Gist ID boleh mengakses kandungannya. Ini adalah tingkah laku semula jadi GitHub Gist, di luar kawalan skrip.

ms.githubCleanupStep2: Untuk repositori, memadam fail sandaran meninggalkan sejarah commit terdahulu. Memadam keseluruhan repositori adalah satu-satunya cara untuk membuang semua jejak.
ms.githubRepoPrivacyError: Ralat: Repositori mesti peribadi untuk membuat sandaran.

tl.githubHelpStep1: 1. Pumunta sa GitHub Settings > Developer settings > Personal access tokens > Tokens (classic).
tl.githubHelpStep2Gist: 2. Gumawa ng bagong token na may 'gist' lamang na scope.
tl.githubHelpStep2Repo: 2. Gumawa ng bagong token na may 'repo' na scope (para sa pribadong repositori).
tl.githubHelpStep3: 3. I-paste ang token na ginawa sa ibaba.
tl.githubHelpStep4Repo: 4. Gumawa ng pribadong repositori sa iyong GitHub account at ilagay ang Owner at Name.
tl.githubHelpImportant: Mahalaga: Huwag ibahagi ang token o Gist ID sa labas ng script na ito.
tl.githubBackupNowInfo: Gagawa ito ng backup ng lahat ng naka-save na video sa format na JSON. Ang file ay mai-upload bilang isang lihim na Gist sa GitHub. Kahit na hindi ito publiko, ang sinumang may Gist ID ay maaaring ma-access ang nilalaman. Ito ay normal na pag-uugali ng GitHub Gist at hindi kontrolado ng script.
tl.githubRepoBackupNowInfo: Gagawa ito ng backup ng lahat ng naka-save na video sa format na JSON. Ang file ay mai-upload sa iyong pribadong repository bilang 'youtube-playback-plox-backup.json'. Ang kasaysayan ng backup ay mapapanatili sa pamamagitan ng Git commits.
tl.githubBackupTypeGist: GitHub Gist (Lihim ngunit hindi ganap na pribado)
tl.githubAutoDeleteToken: Awtomatikong burahin ang token mula sa script pagkatapos ng manu-manong backup
tl.githubGistSafe: Ang Gist ay nangangailangan lamang ng 'gist' na scope (minimal na pribilehiyo).
tl.githubCleanupGuide: Gabayan sa Paglilinis ng Aksidenteng Backup
tl.githubCleanupStep1: Upang ganap na tanggalin ang data, maaari mong i-delete ang Gist o Repository direkta sa GitHub.
tl.githubCleanupStep2: Para sa mga repository, ang pagtanggal ng backup file ay nag-iiwan ng kasaysayan sa nakaraang commits. Tanging ang pagtanggal ng buong repository ang tanging paraan upang linisin ang lahat ng bakas.
tl.githubRepoPrivacyError: Error: Ang repository ay dapat pribado upang mag-backup.
tl.logsCopied: Nakopya na ang mga log sa clipboard!

zu.githubHelpStep1: 1. Iya ku-GitHub Settings > Developer settings > Personal access tokens > Tokens (classic).
zu.githubHelpStep4Repo: 4. Dala i-private repository ku-GitHub bese ufaka Owner ne-Name.
zu.githubHelpImportant: Okubalulekile: Ungabelani ngethokheni noma i-Gist ID nabanye ngaphandle kwalesi script.
zu.githubBackupNowInfo: Lokhu kuzokwenza ikhophi yawo wonke amavidiyo agciniwe ngefomethi ye-JSON. Ifayela lizolayishwa njenge-Gist eyimfihlo ku-GitHub. Nakuba ingekho emphakathini, noma ubani one-Gist ID angakwazi ukuyifinyelela.
zu.githubRepoBackupNowInfo: Lokhu kuzokwenza ikhophi yawo wonke amavidiyo agciniwe ngefomethi ye-JSON. Ifayela lizolayishwa ku-private repository ebizwa 'youtube-playback-plox-backup.json'.
zu.githubAutoDeleteToken: Susa ithokheni ngokuzenzakalelayo ngemva kwekhophi yesandla
zu.githubGistSafe: I-Gist idinga kuphela i-'gist' scope (imvume encane).
zu.githubCleanupStep1: Ukuze ususe yonke idatha, ungakwazi ukususa i-Gist noma i-Repository ku-GitHub.
zu.githubCleanupStep2: Kuma-repository, ukususa ifayela lekopi kushiya umlando we-commit.
zu.githubRepoPrivacyError: Iphutha: I-repository kumele ibe yimfihlo ukwenza ikhophi.
